scripts.dev:vite:vite: pnpm build && concurrently "pnpm cdn" "pnpm demo" "pnpm devtool"
scripts.dev:vite:webpack: pnpm build && concurrently "pnpm cdn" "pnpm demo" "pnpm devtool:webpack"
scripts.dev:vite:rsbuild: pnpm build && concurrently "pnpm cdn" "pnpm demo" "pnpm devtool:rsbuild"
scripts.dev:webpack:webpack: pnpm build && concurrently "pnpm cdn" "pnpm demo:webpack" "pnpm devtool:webpack"
scripts.dev:webpack:vite: pnpm build && concurrently "pnpm cdn" "pnpm demo:webpack" "pnpm devtool:vite"
scripts.dev:webpack:rsbuild: pnpm build && concurrently "pnpm cdn" "pnpm demo:webpack" "pnpm devtool:rsbuild"
scripts.dev:rsbuild:rsbuild: pnpm build && concurrently "pnpm cdn" "pnpm demo:rsbuild" "pnpm devtool:rsbuild"
scripts.dev:rsbuild:vite: pnpm build && concurrently "pnpm cdn" "pnpm demo:rsbuild" "pnpm devtool:vite"
scripts.dev:rsbuild:webpack: pnpm build && concurrently "pnpm cdn" "pnpm demo:rsbuild" "pnpm devtool:webpack"
scripts.git:commit: pnpm git:precommit && git add -A && git commit -m "feat: Introduce new features"
scripts.git:commit:ci: pnpm git:precommit && git add -A && git commit -m "ci: Deploy homepage"
scripts.git:push: pnpm git:commit && git push origin main
scripts.git:push:ci: pnpm git:commit:ci && git push origin main
